allow: Bash(git -C "D:/dev/milome.github.io" add .gitignore .github/workflows/deploy.yml astro.config.mjs package.json package-lock.json postcss.config.cjs tailwind.config.mjs public src)

Bash(git -C "D:/dev/milome.github.io" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: migrate site from Pelican to Astro

Replace the committed Pelican-generated site with a minimal Astro setup for GitHub Pages.
Add Astro content, styling, and Pages workflow while removing legacy static output and theme assets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --base master --head dev --title "feat: migrate site from Pelican to Astro" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- replace the committed Pelican-generated site with a minimal Astro static site
- add Astro pages, content, Tailwind styling, and a GitHub Pages workflow
- remove legacy Pelican output, theme assets, feeds, and custom-domain configuration for `milome.github.io`

## Test plan
- [x] Run `npm install`
- [x] Run `npm run build`
- [x] Verify `dist/index.html` is generated
- [x] Verify `dist/about/index.html` is generated
- [x] Verify `dist/blog/index.html` and `dist/blog/hello-world/index.html` are generated
- [ ] Confirm GitHub Pages is configured to deploy via GitHub Actions
- [ ] Confirm the deployed site is reachable at `https://milome.github.io`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
